title: Makassar Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Makassar with a Z-Score of +3.69. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Makassar is causing significant discomfort to residents and visitors alike. 
 The high temperature is also leading to increased energy consumption as people rely on air conditioning and other cooling devices. 
 The humidity level of 67% is exacerbating the situation, making it feel even hotter than the actual temperature.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately
